final:
module up_counter_with_reset (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [3:0] out
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (reset) begin
        out <= 4'b0;
    end else begin
        out <= out + 1;
    end
end

endmodule
